creator: robson.magno16@gmail.com
text:
I went to install freebsd on my 2007 macbook (macbook3, 1)
but it crashes after the framebuffer information appears.
My installation is via usb, but I think there must be a bug in this code!
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/c07aa0a5878f55ef22b8d0ba5f66a728b1407427/stand/efi/loader/framebuffer.c#L362
